hero.title: About Ibocode
hero.description: Behind every reliable scan is a manufacturer that respects the buyer risk. For over 10 years, Ibocode has focused on one mission: build barcode scanners, thermal printers, and POS equipment that read fast, perform consistently, and scale cleanly.

intro.title: Three ways to know us fast

cards.title: Company Profile
cards.description: Our story, focus, and mission built for global B2B buyers who value predictability.

cards.title: Why Us
cards.description: What buyers gain when they partner with Ibocode, from repeatability to compliance planning.

cards.title: Our Team
cards.description: Practical, fast communication and execution with clear handoffs.

primary.title: Download a Company Introduction Pack
primary.description: Tell us your target market, application, and order quantity. We respond within 24 hours with a practical quote and clear next steps.

secondary.title: Get Samples
secondary.description: Verify read performance, ergonomics, and durability before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
